message:
feat(compat-matrix): validate shim test_case_ref references declared entry refs

Add validation that an explicit shim's test_case_ref must reference an
entry declared in that entry's lockstep_case_refs or test262_refs.
Previously shims could point to arbitrary strings without validation.

Update valid_shim test fixture's test_case_ref from "test/ref.js" to
"lockstep/ref" to match declared refs. Add unit test
validate_entry_shim_detached_test_case_ref_fails and matching integration
test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
